description.zh: 把 OpenClaw 及其 Agent 体系包装成一个可对外讲解、可持续更新、可承接销售的展示站。
description.en: A public showcase that packages OpenClaw and its agent system into something explainable, updateable, and ready for sales.

longDescription.zh: 这个站点承担三件事：向外部访客解释 OPCRO 是什么、通过日志与案例证明它真的在工作、并把智能体与工作流整理成未来可售卖的封装资产。礼部是它的总编排者。
longDescription.en: This site does three things: explain what OPCRO is, prove it is actually working through journals and case studies, and turn agents and workflows into future sellable packaged assets. Libu is the chief orchestrator behind it.

challenge.zh: 原始站点更像若干页面堆叠，没有形成“我一眼就知道你在卖什么”的产品叙事。
challenge.en: The original site felt like stacked screens rather than a product narrative that instantly tells visitors what is being offered.

solution.zh: 重做内容结构：首页讲产品定位，智能体页讲能力，工作流页讲实现方式，日志页讲每日协作，产品页讲交付成果。
solution.en: We rebuilt the content structure so the homepage explains positioning, agents explain capabilities, workflows explain implementation, journals show daily collaboration, and product pages explain deliverables.

deliverables.zh: 智能体、工作流、日志、产品四类内容页
deliverables.en: Four core content sections: agents, workflows, journals, and products

deliverables.zh: 礼部控制台与下载中心
deliverables.en: Libu control room and download center

outcomes.zh: 站点从“展示感不错”升级为“可以拿去卖 Agent 封装”的产品表面。
outcomes.en: The site moved from simply looking nice to becoming a surface that can actually sell packaged agent services.

outcomes.zh: 后续运营不再依赖手工后台，维护成本下降。
outcomes.en: Ongoing operations no longer depend on a manual CMS, lowering maintenance cost.
